title: gonolobus luteus
intro: Gonolobus luteus, also known as Yellow Swallowtail or Yellow Swallowtail Vine, is a type of flowering vine native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gonolobus luteus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Gonolobus luteus typically involve making teas or infusions from the leaves and flowers of the plant, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
